reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Pésimo servicio... Media hora para que encienda la computadora que tiene para cobrar; media hora para que entre en la aplicación de cobro. Más de 5 autos adelante siendo igual en los dos sectores y encima con un solo playero

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service... Half an hour to turn on the computer used to collect payments; half an hour to log into the payment app. More than five cars ahead, the same in both sectors, and on top of that, only one parking attendant.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNRd051VE1nEAE
